hero.title: Savoria
hero.subtitle: Where Every Dish Tells a Story
hero.description: Experience the finest culinary artistry in an atmosphere of refined elegance

about.title: Our Story
about.p1: Founded in 2015, Savoria emerged from a passion for culinary excellence and a commitment to creating unforgettable dining experiences. Our journey began with a simple vision: to blend traditional techniques with modern innovation, crafting dishes that celebrate both heritage and creativity.
about.p2: Every ingredient is carefully sourced from local artisans and sustainable farms, ensuring that each plate reflects our dedication to quality and environmental responsibility. Our team of talented chefs works tirelessly to transform the finest ingredients into culinary masterpieces.
about.p3: At Savoria, dining is more than a meal—it's an experience that engages all the senses, creating memories that linger long after the last bite.
about.quote: At Savoria, we don't just serve food—we craft experiences that celebrate the art of gastronomy.

menu.title: Our Menu
menu.subtitle: Explore our carefully curated selection of exquisite dishes

items.searedScallopsDesc: With citrus beurre blanc and microgreens
items.truffleSoupDesc: Wild mushrooms, truffle oil, crispy shallots
items.tunaTartareDesc: Fresh tuna, avocado, sesame, wasabi aioli
items.wagyuBeefDesc: With roasted vegetables and red wine reduction
items.duckConfitDesc: Crispy duck leg, berry compote, potato gratin
items.chocolateCakeDesc: Molten chocolate center, vanilla ice cream
items.cremeBruleeDesc: Classic French custard with caramelized sugar
items.pistachioEclairDesc: Delicate pastry with pistachio cream filling
items.savoriaSignatureDesc: Whiskey, honey, orange bitters, smoked rosemary

chef.title: Meet Our Chef
chef.name: Marco Bennetti
chef.bio1: With over 20 years of culinary expertise across Europe and Asia, Chef Marco Bennetti brings a unique fusion of traditional Italian techniques and modern gastronomic innovation to Savoria. His passion for perfection and creative vision have earned him international acclaim.
chef.bio2: Trained under Michelin-starred masters in Florence and Paris, Chef Marco's philosophy centers on respecting ingredients, celebrating seasonality, and creating dishes that tell a story. Each plate is a testament to his dedication to the craft and his love for culinary artistry.

items.name: Sarah Johnson
items.text: An extraordinary culinary journey. Every dish is a masterpiece that tells a story of passion and precision.

items.name: Michael Chen
items.text: The attention to detail is impeccable. From the ambiance to the last bite, everything exceeds expectations.

items.name: Emma Williams
items.text: Hosted our corporate dinner here. The service was flawless and the food left everyone speechless.
